name: Stride
description: Stride — AI-powered agile project management tool for software teams with sprint planning and velocity tracking.

seo.title: Stride — Code Assistants / Agent Tooling
seo.meta_description: Stride: Stride — AI-powered agile project management tool for software teams with sprint planning and velocity tracking.

when_to_use: Building AI-native developer tools with modular agent SDK
Automating complex coding tasks with an AI agent orchestration layer
Integrating AI workflow automation into existing dev toolchains
Running multi-step AI task execution in development environments

pros: AI-assisted sprint planning and velocity tracking
Quick for retros and capacity planning
cons: Not a code assistant despite the category
Linear, Shortcut, and Jira are deeply entrenched
AI velocity predictions are only as good as input data
review.verdict: Reasonable agile tool if Jira is too heavy, but miscategorized here and not a coding product.
review.best_for: Small agile teams wanting lightweight AI-flavored sprint planning
review.not_for: Teams needing coding help or enterprises committed to Jira or Linear
